title: Add direct jump flow from proposal artifacts into native review focus
summary: Extend proposal artifact surfaces so a saved markdown proposal can jump directly into the matching native review or navigation focus instead of stopping at a generic component or view detail.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal artifact surfaces expose a direct jump action into the matching native focus workflow.
The jump target is chosen truthfully from existing scope metadata rather than guessed from unrelated state.
The UX clearly distinguishes review/navigation focus jumps from the existing generic scope inspection action.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal artifact list and detail surfaces now expose explicit direct-focus actions that route component-scoped artifacts into review focus and view-scoped artifacts into navigation focus while preserving the existing Inspect Scope action.
Localized native labels were added for the new focus-jump actions so the proposal and review surfaces stay on the typed StudioStrings path.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the direct focus jump slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0024: add direct jump flow from proposal artifacts into matching review/navigation focus.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Reuse existing review and navigation selection models instead of adding a parallel proposal-only router.
Keep scope jump language truthful when a direct focus target is unavailable.
